themes.exampleQuote: The food taste is the best you can find in Pittsburgh and no other Indian restaurant can match the level.
The person taking the order had the audacity to ask if it was my first time in the US.
The service is excellent every single time we visit.
Sahil provided outstanding service — he was so attentive and did everything perfectly.
Sahil has been very kind and helpful with accepting custom orders whenever I come with my friends.
The staff were extremely rude and dismissive, which made the atmosphere feel unwelcoming.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently rave about Reva's delicious, authentic Indian food and frequently single out Sahil for exceptional service, but a notable minority report jarring experiences with rude, dismissive staff that undercut the restaurant's otherwise strong reputation.
notable_quote: Reva Modern Indian Cuisine is hands down our number one restaurant in Pittsburgh.
